headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Caterpillar (CAT) After Its 158% One-Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Caterpillar at US$914.70 is priced for perfection or still offers value, the starting point is understanding what the current market is really paying for. The stock has returned 0.5% over the past week, 1.9% over the past month, 52.9% year to date and 157.9% over the last year, which naturally raises questions about how much of the story is already reflected in the share price. Recent attention on large industrial and capital goods companies has kept Caterpillar...
